title: Scottish Cod Fish Tacos
description: A twist on traditional Mexican tacos, this recipe marries the flavors of Scotland with the boldness of Mexico.

ingredients.name: innovative
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh cilantro, scallions, or other herbs of choice

ingredients.name: scottish
ingredients.notes: Smoked salmon or other Scottish-style salmon

ingredients.name: fish
ingredients.notes: Diced fish for added flavor and texture

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the cod fillets with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Grill the cod for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of cod on each tortilla, followed by a spoonful of innovative toppings and a dollop of Scottish-style salmon.
Top with fish and serve immediately.
Serve with tortilla chips on the side for added crunch.
